News & Updates

The latest developments from Bugwere Coffee Company and our community.

Featured
Program Update
November 29, 2025

Fertilizer Distribution Boosts Productivity for 7,000 Households

Our latest fertilizer distribution campaign has reached over 7,000 homes across the Bugwere region, with farmers reporting significant improvements in crop health and expected yields. This milestone represents the largest single distribution in our history, made possible through partnerships with local government and international development agencies.

Read Full Story
Latest Stories
Expansion
November 29, 2025

Cocoa Expansion Program Impacts 3,700 Homes

The cocoa expansion program continues to transform livelihoods, with 3,700 homes now equipped with cocoa seedlings and the training needed to cultivate this resilient, high-value crop.

Read More
Milestone
November 29, 2025

Bugwere Coffee Company Reaches Over 5,000 Homes With Coffee Seedlings

A landmark milestone for BCC as our coffee seedling distribution program surpasses 5,000 households, representing thousands of families building sustainable income through coffee farming.

Read More
More From the Field
October 15, 2025
Community

SACCO Membership Surpasses 3,500 Active Members

Our community savings and credit cooperative continues to grow, providing financial services to thousands of rural families.

September 28, 2025
Agriculture

New Disease-Resistant Coffee Varieties Introduced

BCC partners with research institutions to bring next-generation coffee varieties to Bugwere farmers, promising higher yields and better resilience.

August 10, 2025
Partnership

Partnership With District Government Expands Training Programs

A new memorandum of understanding with local government will double our training capacity across the Bugwere region.
